name: Screen Capture
description: Screenshot or record your whole screen, a window, or a browser tab. Drag on the canvas to crop — the export stays the exact pixels you captured.
a11yLabel: Screen capture, ready to crop and export

inputs.label: Screenshot
inputs.help: Pick an image to crop, or use the Screenshot button above the canvas where your browser supports screen capture.

inputs.label: Crop
inputs.help: Region of the shot to export, as a percentage. Drag on the canvas to set it.

inputs.label: Recording name
inputs.help: Filename for a saved screen recording.

inputs.label: System audio
inputs.help: Record the sound from the shared screen or tab. Full system-wide audio is Chrome on Windows/ChromeOS; on a tab it's the tab's audio; on macOS and Firefox there may be no system sound at all.

inputs.label: Narrate
inputs.help: Also record your microphone so you can talk over the take.
